matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Alo Restaurant

node.name: Alo Restaurant
node.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Canoe Restaurant

node.name: Canoe Restaurant
node.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 5 > Kaiseki Kaji

node.name: Kaiseki Kaji
node.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 4 > Lee Restaurant

node.name: Lee Restaurant
node.description: Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Cluny Bistro

node.name: Cluny Bistro
node.description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 8 > Antler Kitchen

node.name: Antler Kitchen
node.description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 10 > 360 Restaurant at CN Tower

node.name: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower
node.description: Revolving restaurant atop CN Tower with panoramic views. Special occasion dining with Canadian cuisine. Memorable farewell lunch.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > The Keg Steakhouse

node.name: The Keg Steakhouse
node.description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 9 > Bar Isabel

node.name: Bar Isabel
node.description: Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 3 > FRANK Restaurant at AGO

node.name: FRANK Restaurant at AGO
node.description: Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu.
